chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3022 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.15923/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on M.A. No.15924/2025 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.11.2025 M/s. Asghar Ali Malik and Muhammad Nadeem Qureshi, Advocates for the Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Mazher Abbas Sahi son of Muhammad Sadiq Sahi seeks protective bail in FIR No.152/2023 under Section-17/22 Emigration Ordinance, 1979 r/w section 6(I)(e), Passport Act, 1974, registered at P.S FIA A.H.T Circle, Karachi. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that his CNIC was recently blocked and upon inquiry he came to know that such action was taken due to registration of the present FIR; that the trial Court has issued NBWs against him, whereas he apprehends his imminent arrest at the very threshold of the court; that the applicant has no intention to abscond and intends to surrender before the trial court to face the trial, therefore, NBWs may be suspended to enable him to surrender for his bail, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 06 days from today i.e 07.11.2025 to 12.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that his CNIC was recently blocked and upon inquiry he came to know that such action was taken due to registration of the present FIR; that the trial Court has issued NBWs against him, whereas he apprehends his imminent arrest at the very threshold of the court; that the applicant has no intention to abscond and intends to surrender before the trial court to face the trial, therefore, NBWs may be suspended to enable him to surrender for his bail, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 06 days from today i.e 07.11.2025 to 12.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. In the meanwhile, operation of the NBWs issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 06 days period i.e. 12.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, 2 however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
